title: Notable German Pop Love Songs
markdown:
So far the best in German songstress is “Untoten”  I haven’t translated her music, but given the band’s name, it’s probably not light love songs.


On the other hand, Diene Lakaien, is German, but everything I’ve heard from him is in English.  \[[Notice how many comments are in German.](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8iSd0BDxm-A)]  His best song is “Where You Are”




> And I changed my life  
> 
> And I moved outside  
> 
> Where the water is clean and pure  
> 
> Where the lands are wide  
> 
> Where the air is bright  
> 
> All my feelings are with you
